title: Buttery Dense Tunisian Chorizo Tagine
description: A rich, buttery brunchmood tagine featuring spicy chorizo, roasted root vegetables, and a fragrant tomatoharissa sauce, all in a lowFODMAP friendly format.

ingredients.name: smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Season with salt and pepper to taste

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium‑high heat and add the olive oil.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook 2‑3 minutes until lightly browned; remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, melt the butter, then add the sliced carrots and red bell pepper; cook 5 minutes until slightly softened.
Stir in the zucchini, harissa paste, cumin, and smoked paprika; cook 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes, lemon juice, and chopped parsley; stir to combine.
Return the chorizo to the skillet, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer 15 minutes to meld the flavors.
Taste and season with salt and pepper as desired; adjust lemon juice for brightness.
Serve hot, optionally accompanied by toasted bread or crusty flatbread.
